phase: R9 — fresh pool redeploy (event-aging + cross-device test bloat); ASP kept
reason: Live pool CBWVWCZI failed with 'could not resolve a known pool root' after cross-device testing (merchant on phone, paid from laptop) + multiple test payments — the pool commitment tree accrued enough leaves that early Deposit/ChangeNote events aged out of the public RPC ~8000-ledger event window, so resolvePoolLeaves could not rebuild a tree whose root the contract accepts.
wasm: contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/cowrie_pool_usdc.wasm (unchanged since Jul 1 07:00 commit 4bd58c9 — identical code to retired pool)
asp_kept: CCD33Z46QFHZOA4FCUM6DND7H6WGUK5VSX2YUZV5PUVXRKY3QB3F3UPL (ASP resolved via authoritative on-chain leaf read => immune to event-aging)
wallet_reset_note: Old demo wallets hold notes that reference the retired pool tree and must be reset ('reset demo' / fresh key). A fresh wallet deposits + spends cleanly on the new pool.
